title: Equestria Delight
description: A farmers delight addon that adds mlp foods.
body:
![equestria delight icon](https://i.imgur.com/MmysdNn.png)

A farmers delight addon that adds mlp foods. All item have 3d models, with pony orgins compatibility.

Required dependency: [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight) Optional: [Pony Origins](https://modrinth.com/datapack/ponyorigins) (make gemstone cupcakes editable for dragons)
Item list: - Daisy sandwich

- Carrot dog

- Pasta and Potato Sandwiches on Grilled Sourdough

- Uncooked and Cooked Rock soup

- 7 gemstone cupcakes

- 16 color rock candys

- 16 color rock candy cupcakes

- Hay Burger

- Horseshoe Fries

Content me if youre interested in offering help with development of this mod. ![bowing emoji](https://i.imgur.com/BMIiyoR.gif)
